properties: Calonemorchis valida is a species of orchid that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines and other parts of Asia. Its therapeutic properties have been associated with the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal effects. Additionally, Calonemorchis valida is reportedly used as an expectorant to relieve coughs and bronchial congestion.
